name: HWR_GBL_PRFL_MTOR_RNK_B
description: This table is for Mentor Suggestion List for Reputation and Social Roles

columns.Name: GBL_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This is global profile id of the user

columns.Name: HWR_ORG_ID
columns.Comments: This column is the org id of the user

columns.Name: MNGR_ORG_ID
columns.Comments: This column is the org id of the manager of the user

columns.Name: TYPE_OF_RECORD
columns.Comments: This column is the Id indicating the type of the post-control record

columns.Name: CONTROL_KEY
columns.Comments: This column is theKey of the control key this record is representing

columns.Name: MEAN_GLOBAL_PERCENTILE
columns.Comments: Mean Global Percentile for score metric at global profile level on the last computed date

columns.Name: MEAN_SOC_MED_SCORE
columns.Comments: Mean Social Media Relevance score at global profile level on the last computed date

columns.Name: METRIC_DATE
columns.Comments: This column is the Date this metric record is for

columns.Name: METRIC_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: This column is the Metric attribute 1

columns.Name: METRIC_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: This column is the Metric attribute 2

columns.Name: METRIC_ATTR_3
columns.Comments: This column is the Metric attribute 3

columns.Name: METRIC_ATTR_4
columns.Comments: This column is the Metric attribute 4

columns.Name: METRIC_ATTR_5
columns.Comments: This column is the Metric attribute 5

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
